title: feat(sdk): model catalog helper + client subpath
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `fetchModelCatalog()` for normalized image/video/text/audio model metadata and allowed-model ID sets.
- Adds the `@pollinations/sdk/client` export subpath.
- Bumps `@pollinations/sdk` to `5.1.0-alpha.0` so PR6 publishes it under the `alpha` npm dist-tag.
- Adds PolliProvider setup guidance for non-`pk_` keys and local redirect URIs.
- Marks the SDK alpha release line as unstable in the README.

Validation:
- `npm run typecheck --workspace @pollinations/sdk`
- `npm test --workspace @pollinations/sdk`
- `npm run build --workspace @pollinations/sdk`
- `npm ci --dry-run` in `packages/sdk`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- Runtime import/smoke check for `@pollinations/sdk/client` and `fetchModelCatalog()`

gist.headline: Cataloging the hive
gist.blurb: We've added a new fetchModelCatalog() helper to the SDK, making it a breeze to grab normalized metadata for all our image, video, text, and audio models. Plus, a shiny new @pollinations/sdk/client export subpath is ready for testing in the latest alpha release.
gist.summary: Added fetchModelCatalog() to the SDK for retrieving normalized metadata across all model types, introduced the @pollinations/sdk/client export subpath, and published as 5.1.0-alpha.0.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily fetch and filter allowed model IDs and metadata programmatically, and access client-specific exports via the new subpath.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a librarian or archivist, holding a catalog or map of models, with the Monitor Robot displaying a list of models on its screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny librarian glasses, holding a glowing digital catalog book. Next to her, the chunky Monitor Robot displays a neat list of colorful model icons on its CRT screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
